name: 𝐘𝐞𝐨 𝐓𝐚𝐞𝐣𝐮
description:
[BL/MLM] ♡ || Yeo Taeju saves you from drowning yourself and your little brother.

NOTE: Hi! I came back with another bot but with Taeju from the Manhwa called 'Low Tide In Twilight or Night By The Sea', I hope you guys enjoy it! In here though, you're not Euihyun, you're you, yourself, and yes, Euiyoung is your little brother in here, I decided to include him, one more thing, I made the intro a bit different and he's kind of a green flag in here and kind of the family like guy in here, at least. If the bot talks for you then it's not something I can control, it's not my fault.
